title: Front Office Manager - Taj Hotels - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Taj Hotels - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Taj Hotels! We are hiring a Front Office Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Taj Hotels:
Taj Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels!
